title: Server Message Block (SMB)

headings.text: Where to Observe This in Wireshark

overview: SMB is a network protocol used to provide shared access to files, folders, printers, and other resources over a network. It's primarily used in Windows environments, but Linux systems can interact with SMB using tools like Samba.

study.overview: SMB is a network protocol used to provide shared access to files, folders, printers, and other resources over a network. It's primarily used in Windows environments, but Linux systems can interact with SMB using tools like Samba.
study.whySoc: Use this note as an analyst reference: understand the concept, identify the relevant telemetry, pivot through evidence, and document the decision path clearly.
